features: QUALITY BEYOND THE SCALE: Rust Free Nail scissor made up of Stainless steel we polish it also which makes it more durable and gives perfect grip. The blade is sharp, cutting effortlessly.
VERY CONVENIENT: The surface is treated with a mirror finish which looks more advanced and is also easy to clean and store. Small size and easy to carry it is a necessity in your personal care kit.

MEET ALL YOUR NEEDS: It can be used to trim eyebrows beard and nose hair nail barbs and help you say goodbye to sloppy images. It is also very suitable for trimming false eyelashes or even paper cutting!
PERFECT GRIP: Comfortable handle keeps your fingers away from injury and paining unlike other brands. An ideal beauty care tool for Women Men Babies and professionals.
FOR YOUR HELP: If you have any question, doubt or problem about this product; you can contact us directly. We are always here to solve your problem.
